title: ageratina zunilana
intro: Ageratina zunilana, also known as 'Ejote de Monte', is a type of flowering plant in the mint family, native to the tropical regions of Central America and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Ageratina zunilana include relief from digestive issues, such as dyspepsia and gastritis, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory conditions. Ageratina zunilana is often prepared as a tea or infusion, with the leaves and stems being used to make herbal remedies.
